verse.name: V1
verse.lines: O, glorious victory That day He set me free, And He made my heart His very throne. My life is no longer mine, I'm a prisoner of love divine, And now I live to praise His name.

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: Who I am, Lord, who I am, I can see now, who I am. A part of my Saviour, A part of His Word. It's a revelation (It's predestination) Of who I am.

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: On Calvary He died To redeem His lost Bride, The King of Kings Became my Saviour; This is God's great mystery Of love expressed to me, That Christ and I Might be made one!
